untranslatable_reason: The AEDB pattern detection requires visual pattern recognition (identifying ascending-descending-ascending-descending shapes, lower left vs lower right bottoms, dome-shaped vs U-shaped volume profiles). These geometric/morphological characteristics cannot be expressed using the allowed indicators and operators. Additionally, market direction regime detection (BULL_MARKET vs BEAR_MARKET) is not in the allowed regime list (only TRENDING_UP, TRENDING_DOWN, RANGING, HIGH_VOL, ANY are available).
translation_notes: Attempted to capture breakout direction with volume increase condition and exit on trend reversal. However, the core signal depends on pattern shape analysis and market regime classification that exceed the capabilities of the allowed indicator set. Recommendation: implement custom pattern detection function or use allowed regimes TRENDING_UP/TRENDING_DOWN as proxies for BULL_MARKET/BEAR_MARKET.
